OTP sent to your registered mobile number
Screening for Blindness and Refractive Errors
Suspected visual impairment identified. Please complete the case identification below.
Difficulty in breathing detected. Diagnose URI / Rhinitis / Sinusitis. Refer if not manageable at HWC.
Open mouth breathing detected. Diagnose URI / Rhinitis / Sinusitis. Refer if not manageable at HWC.
Severe pain detected. Referral to higher facility is recommended.
Severe symptoms detected. Referral to higher facility is recommended.
Vitamin A Deficiency Symptoms / Bitot\'s Spot Identified *
Refer to ophthalmologist at the secondary level.
Patient may qualify for presbyopia management (e.g., reading glasses) as per CHO service scope.
Vitamin A prophylaxis to be given. Refer to ophthalmologist at the secondary level.

string-array.name: ophthalmic_reason_for_visit_options
string-array.item: First aid for eye injury/ trauma

resources.string: Consent for the creation of ABHA Number

I, hereby declare that I am voluntarily sharing my Aadhaar Number and demographic information issued by UIDAI, with National Health Authority (NHA)for the sole purpose of creation of ABHA Number.I understand that my ABHA Number can be used and shared for purposes as may be notified by ABDM from time to time including provision of healthcare services. \n\nFurther,I am aware that my personal identifiable information (Name, Address, Age, Date of Birth, Gender and Photograph) may be made available to the entities working in the NationalDigital Health Ecosystem (NDHE)which inter alia includes stakeholders and entities such as healthcare professionals (e.g. doctors), facilities (e.g. hospitals, laboratories) and data fiduciaries (e.g. health programmers), which are registered with or linked to the Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM), and various processes there under. I authorize NHA to use myAadhaar number for performing Aadhaar based authentication with UIDAI as per the provisions of the Aadhaar (Targeted Delivery of Financial and other Subsidies, Benefits and Services) Act, 2016 for the aforesaid purpose.I understand that UIDAI will share my e-KYC details, or response of “Yes” with NHA upon successful authentication. I have been duly informed about the option of using other IDs apart from Aadhaar; however,I consciously choose to use Aadhaar number for the purpose of availing benefits across the NDHE.I am aware that my personal identifiable information excluding Aadhaar number can be used and shared for purposes as mentioned above.I reserve the right to revoke the given consent at any point of time as per provisions of Aadhar Act and Regulations.
I hereby confirm that I have explained the below mentioned consent process to the individual for the creation of the ABHA Number using he individual\'s aadhar number
Do you want to go back?
Enter other Type of Allergic Reaction
Upload File(Size limit :5 MB)\nSupported File Formats \n(.msg,.pdf,.png,.jpeg,.doc,.docx,.xlsx,.xls,.csv,.txt)
Error in Saving Refer and Revisit Information
Individual’s consent for creation of ABHA Number.
Please Place your Finger on the fingerprint sensor to proceed
Downloading required data. This may take a few minutes on first login.
Do you want to cancel? Any unsaved data will be lost.
Nurse data is not saved for this record
This case is being closed. Do you want to proceed?
There are unsynced nurse data found. please sync and try again
Please search for Beneficiary before registration.
No matching patient found. Please choose an option from below.
Permission to access the Camera denied!
Do you want to exit application
Submit Old Chief Complaints and vitals data
Only Alphabets in upper case allowed!
Only Alphabets and special characters allowed!
%1s should be greater than or equal to %2d
%1s should be greater than or equal to %2.1f
%1s should be lesser than or equal to %2d
%1s should be lesser than or equal to %2.1f
Pregnancy Registration form is not available
Family planning method used by the couple after delivery to avoid pregnancy?
Referral required: 2 or more maternal symptoms detected
Referral required: Heavy bleeding or foul-smelling discharge detected
Failed to save form. Please try again.
Error loading visits. Please try again.

resources.string: Are you using / Do you want to use any Family Planning Method?
Please upload MCA Card photo to claim your Incentive
Please upload Discharge Summary photo to claim your Incentive
Only one visit is allowed per month
Visit date cannot be before EC Registration date
LMP date can only be backdated up to 6 months
Date of sterilization can only be backdated up to 2 months
Date of ANTRA injection can only be backdated up to 2 months
Gap is more than 120 days. Restarting from Dose 1.
Intensive PNC monitoring recommended for this mother.
Family planning status and eligible couple tracking will be updated for hysterectomy.
Maternal death audit form will be opened.
Discharge date cannot be before delivery date.
Home delivery occurred. Provide counselling on risks. Ensure immediate PNC visit within 24 hours.
Urgent PNC home visit within 24 hours required.
Please select at least one indication
A similar face was found in the system. Do you want to use the existing record or continue with new registration?
Please counsel the beneficiary to enroll for ABHA ID
Reason for not giving birth dose vaccines
Reason for not giving Vitamin K injection
Low Birth Weight (LBW): 1500-2499g. Close monitoring required.
Very Low Birth Weight (VLBW): 1000-1499g. Immediate SNCU referral recommended.
Extremely Low Birth Weight (ELBW): \u003c1000g. Critical - NICU care required.
Ambiguous genitalia detected. Pediatric specialist referral required.
Stillbirth recorded. Stillbirth audit form will be triggered.
Neonatal death recorded. Death audit form will be triggered.
Immediate pediatric/specialist review required for complications.
Ensure proper PNC counseling for mother on newborn care.
Birth registration is a legal requirement.
Birth weight must be between 500g and 6000g
Please select current status of baby
Please select if Vitamin K was given
Neck swelling detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Difficulty in swallowing detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Cleft lip detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Cleft palate detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Systolic BP > 120 mmHg. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Diastolic BP > 80 mmHg. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Posterior visible detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Chronic sinusitis suspected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Refer patient to Dentist at the secondary level.
Please wait while master location coordinates are fetched.
Error while saving the master location
Events for this Date already exist
Please capture the image to continue.
Maximum value allowed for Duration is 6.
You have moved more than 2 meters from the fixed point. Do you want to update your location?
Please confirm to logout and exit.
You are trying to Log-in away from your facility. Do you want to retry?
An update is ready to install.
A patient with Beneficiary ID %1$s already exists in the system.
Failed to save patient due to missing data. Please ensure all data is synced.
This case is being closed. Do you want to proceed?
Cannot close case: Lab test is pending
Cannot close case: Medicine has not been dispensed
Thoughts of self-harm or suicide present
Seizures, fits, or loss of consciousness present
Little interest or pleasure in doing things
Trouble falling/staying asleep, or sleeping too much
Feeling tired or having little energy
Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure
Moving or speaking slowly, or being fidgety/restless
Thoughts that you would be better off dead or of hurting yourself
Substance Use Screening and Brief Intervention
Impact on daily functioning (health, family, work)
CHO assessment of problematic alcohol use
Current thoughts of self-harm or ending life
Moderate Suicide Risk: Immediate counselling required. Consider referral.
High Suicide Risk: Emergency intervention required. Refer immediately.
Tongue bite or incontinence during episode
Decline in daily functioning (self-care, routine activities)
Abnormal hearing detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Deep foreign body detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Congenital ear malformation detected. Refer patient to specialist at secondary level.
Sensitivity to hot and cold, sweet and sour
Food lodgment in the cavity/ between teeth
Functional decline / difficulty in daily activities (ADL)
Patient has functional decline. Please refer to higher facility if needed.
Patient has memory loss. Please refer to higher facility if needed.
Moderate Suicide Risk: Immediate counselling required. Consider referral.
High Suicide Risk: Emergency intervention required. Refer immediately.
